targets.queryText: SELECT cvar_to_income_ratio AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT cvar_to_income_ratio AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT max_drawdown_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT max_drawdown_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT drawdown_duration_1y_days AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT drawdown_duration_1y_days AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ulcer_index_1y AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ulcer_index_1y AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, drawdown_depth_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, drawdown_depth_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, cvar_95_1d_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, cvar_95_1d_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-180 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS date, ROUND(drawdown_depth_pct, 2) AS depth_pct, drawdown_duration_1y_days AS duration_days FROM daily_portfolio WHERE drawdown_depth_pct < -5 ORDER BY drawdown_depth_pct ASC LIMIT 15;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS date, ROUND(drawdown_depth_pct, 2) AS depth_pct, drawdown_duration_1y_days AS duration_days FROM daily_portfolio WHERE drawdown_depth_pct < -5 ORDER BY drawdown_depth_pct ASC LIMIT 15;
